gloop.configuration.title: Gloop Configs
gloop.configuration.magicmirrorcooldownt: Magic Mirror tick after using mirror
jei.gloop.scythe_description: Has higher attack range but deal less damage per second than an axe or sword, pulls opponents to user, supports back stab.
jei.gloop.dagger_description: Has lower range than a sword. When another dagger of the same material is in the other hand damage is increased. Supports BackStabing.
enchantment.gloop.acceleration.desc: When a tool with this enchantment mines the same block as the last block mined it accelerates
enchantment.gloop.backstab.desc: When the enemy is facing away; This enchantment makes the tools it can go on deal extra damage
enchantment.gloop.blockburst.desc: Block burst make a small explosion occasionally on mined blocks; further more higher levels of Ground burst make bigger explosions.
